flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Western Washington University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.9k → $28.7k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Western Washington University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.7k → $9.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Western Washington University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Western Washington University rose 20% between 2006 and 2009 (29.4% → 35.5%).
